name: GPT-5 nano
archDisplay: Smallest, fastest sibling of GPT-5's unified architecture; dense transformer, exact size undisclosed
note: Smallest, fastest GPT-5 variant for high-volume, latency-sensitive workloads.

results.notes: GPQA Diamond, no tools, high reasoning effort

SimpleQA (no web) accuracy for gpt-5-thinking-nano = 11% (hallucination rate 31%), directly read from Table 8 of the official GPT-5 System Card PDF (cdn.openai.com/gpt-5-system-card.pdf). This is the reasoning ('thinking') path of GPT-5 nano, consistent with the model's existing gpqa row also being a 'high reasoning effort' figure.

Humanity's Last Exam score from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano (relayed via themodelbeat.com, which attributes its benchmark table explicitly to Epoch AI). Not an OpenAI self-reported figure.
MMLU-Pro score from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano, relayed via themodelbeat.com.

Combined AIME 2024/2025 score from Epoch AI's independent evaluation. The corpus's prior verification pass had already found and dropped an unconfirmed self-reported nano AIME claim (85.2) that conflicted with an Artificial Analysis re-eval (83.7); this Epoch AI figure (81.1) is a third, independently-sourced data point in the same ballpark, offered here explicitly as an independent (not self-reported) figure to avoid re-introducing the earlier conflict as a vendor claim.
ARC-AGI (v1) score from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano, relayed via themodelbeat.com.
ARC-AGI-2 score from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano, relayed via themodelbeat.com.

LiveCodeBench score from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano, relayed via themodelbeat.com -- same source/methodology already used for this model's existing hle/mmlu-pro/aime/arc-agi-1/arc-agi-2 independent rows.

FrontierMath (Tiers 1-3) from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano, relayed via themodelbeat.com. The page also separately lists 'FrontierMath Tier 4' (added as its own row under the frontiermath-tier4 slug).
FrontierMath Tier 4 (hardest tier) from Epoch AI's independent evaluation of GPT-5 nano, relayed via themodelbeat.com.

verificationNotes: Existence, release date and pricing/context ($0.05/$0.40 per 1M, 400K context) confirmed by live-fetching developers.openai.com/api/docs/models/gpt-5-nano (also cites snapshot gpt-5-nano-2025-08-07). Primary blog page inaccessible (403/rate-limited) for direct row-by-row confirmation. Only gpqa (71.2) could be independently corroborated verbatim via secondary sources. AIME claim (85.2) conflicts with an independent Artificial Analysis re-eval (83.7, different methodology, not the cited self-reported source) and could not be confirmed on the primary source; swe-bench (54.7), hle (8.7), mmmu (75.6) and tau-bench (35.5) could not be found on any accessible source. Dropped all 5 unconfirmed rows per verification policy, kept only gpqa.
